title: HAPPY RIDE
description: “An intercity ride-hailing platform built on a marketplace model, maximizing benefits for both riders and drivers while challenging the traditional aggregator model.”

title: AS SIMPLE AS THAT
description: “A pilot project in next-generation fashion tech, enabling designers to directly sell their creations to consumers and fashion enthusiasts while challenging the traditional textile model.”

title: THE NEWS ARTICLE
description: “A next-generation news platform delivering verified facts in the simplest and most accessible way to consumers.”
